com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The billing account that the payment is for.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Billing Account
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__BillingAccount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The CRM Account that this payment is related to.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Account
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Account__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The accounting code for the payment. Accounting codes group transactions that contain similar accounting attributes.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Accounting Code
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__AccountingCode__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The amount of the payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Amount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The applied amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Applied Amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__AppliedAmount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The amount of the payment to apply to a credit balance.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Applied Credit Balance Amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__AppliedCreditBalanceAmount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The authorization transaction ID from the payment gateway. Use this field for electronic payments, such as credit cards.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Auth Transaction ID
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__AuthTransactionId__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The first six digits of the credit card or debit card used for the payment, when applicable.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Bank Identification Number
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__BankIdentificationNumber__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment was canceled.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Cancelled On
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__CancelledOn__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The comment about the payment
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Comment
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Comment__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Zuora user who created the payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Created By
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__CreatedById__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment was created in Zuora system.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Created Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__CreatedDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment takes effect.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Effective Date (Deprecated)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__EffectiveDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment takes effect.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Effective Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Effective_Date__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The ID of the gateway order, which is the merchant-specified natural key value.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Gateway Order ID
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__GatewayOrderId__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The code returned from the payment gateway for the payment. This code is gateway-dependent.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Gateway Response Code
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__GatewayResponseCode__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The message returned from the payment gateway for the payment. This message is gateway-dependent.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Gateway Response
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__GatewayResponse__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The unique identification number for the invoice that the payment is applied to.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Invoice Number
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__InvoiceNumber__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when a payment was marked and waiting for batch submission to the payment process. Use this field for the Spectrum gateway only.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Marked For Submission On
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__MarkedForSubmissionOn__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The display name of the payment method used for the payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Payment Method Name
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__PaymentMethod__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Payment Method that this payment is related to.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Payment Method (Deprecated)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Payment_Method__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The transaction ID returned by the payment gateway. Use this field to reconcile payments between your gateway and Zuora Payments.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Reference ID
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__ReferenceId__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The amount of the payment that is refunded. This field is null if no refund is made against the payment. Intended for use with AR Settlement.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Refund Amount (AR Settlement)
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__RefundAmount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The transaction ID returned by the payment gateway if there is an additional transaction for the payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Second Payment Reference ID
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__SecondPaymentReferenceId__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment was settled in the payment processor.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Settled On
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__SettledOn__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: A payment gateway-specific field that maps to Zuora for the gateways, Orbital and Verifi
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Soft Descriptor Phone
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__SoftDescriptorPhone__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: A payment gateway-specific field that maps to Zuora for the gateways, Orbital and Verifi.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Soft Descriptor
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__SoftDescriptor__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The status of the payment in the Zuora system. The value depends on the type of payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Status
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Status__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment was submitted.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Submitted On
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__SubmittedOn__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Indicates if the payment was transferred to an external accounting system.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Transferred to Accounting
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__TransferedToAccounting__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Indicates if the payment is external or electronic.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Type
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__Type__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The unapplied amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Unapplied Amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__UnappliedAmount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Zuora user who last updated the payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Updated By
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__UpdatedById__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The date when the payment was last updated in Zuora system.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Updated Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__UpdatedDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The amount of the payment to apply to an invoice.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Applied Invoice Amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__AppliedInvoiceAmount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The amount of the payment that is refunded. This field is null if no refund is made against the payment.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Refund Amount
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Zuora__RefundedAmount__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The message returned from the payment gateway for external payments like paybylink. This message is gateway-dependent.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: External Gateway Response
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: externalGatewayResponse__c
